channel.title: ZUSO Advanced Research Team (ZUSO ART) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by ZUSO Advanced Research Team (ZUSO ART) (zuso_art).

item.title: CVE-2026-24729 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Interinfo DreamMaker - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the file upload function of Interinfo DreamMaker versions before 2025/10/22 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary system commands via a malicious class file.

item.title: CVE-2026-24728 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Interinfo DreamMaker - Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: A missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in the /servlet/baServer3 endpoint of Interinfo DreamMaker versions before 2025/10/22 allows remote attackers to access exposed administrative functionality without prior authentication.

item.title: CVE-2025-31342 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Galaxy Software Services Vitals ESP Forum Module - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the upload file function of Galaxy Software Services Corporation Vitals ESP Forum Module through 1.3 version allows remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary system commands vi…

item.title: CVE-2025-54946 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SUNNET Corporate Training Management System - SQL Injection
item.description: A SQL injection vulnerability in SUNNET Corporate Training Management System before 10.11 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands.

item.title: CVE-2025-54945 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SUNNET Corporate Training Management System - External Control of File Name or Path
item.description: An external control of file name or path vulnerability in SUNNET Corporate Training Management System before 10.11 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary system commands via a malicious file by controlling the destination file path.

item.title: CVE-2025-54944 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SUNNET Corporate Training Management System - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in SUNNET Corporate Training Management System before 10.11 allows remote attackers to write malicious code in a specific file, which may lead to arbitrary code execution.

item.title: CVE-2025-54943 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SUNNET Corporate Training Management System - Missing Authorization
item.description: A missing authorization vulnerability in SUNNET Corporate Training Management System before 10.11 allows remote attackers to perform unauthorized application deployment due to the absence of proper access control checks.

item.title: CVE-2025-54942 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — SUNNET Corporate Training Management System - Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: A missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in SUNNET Corporate Training Management System before 10.11 allows remote attackers to access deployment functionality without prior authentication.

item.title: CVE-2025-48784 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System - Missing Authorization
item.description: A missing authorization vulnerability in Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System through version 7.3.2025.0408 allows remote attackers to modify system settings without prior authorization.

item.title: CVE-2025-48783 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System - External Control of File Name or Path
item.description: An external control of file name or path vulnerability in the delete file function of Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System through version 7.3.2025.0408 allows remote attackers to delete partial files by specifying arbitrary file paths.

item.title: CVE-2025-48782 · 9.9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the upload file function of Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System through version 7.3.2025.0408 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary system commands via a malicious…

item.title: CVE-2025-48781 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System - External Control of File Name or Path
item.description: An external control of file name or path vulnerability in the download file function of Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System through version 7.3.2025.0408 allows remote attackers to obtain partial files by specifying arbitrary file paths.

item.title: CVE-2025-48780 · 9.9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System - Deserialization of Untrusted Data
item.description: A deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in the download file function of Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System through version 7.3.2025.0408 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary system commands via a crafted serialized obj…

item.title: CVE-2025-5192 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System - Missing Authentication for Critical Function
item.description: A missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in the client application of Soar Cloud HRD Human Resource Management System through version 7.3.2025.0408 allows remote attackers to bypass authentication and access application functions.

item.title: CVE-2025-31338 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Wisdom Master Pro - Missing Authorization
item.description: A missing authorization vulnerability in the retrieve teacher Information function of Wisdom Master Pro versions 5.0 through 5.2 allows remote attackers to obtain partial user data by accessing the API functionality.

item.title: CVE-2025-31339 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Wisdom Master Pro - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: An unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in the course management function of Wisdom Master Pro versions 5.0 through 5.2 allows remote authenticated users to craft a malicious file.

item.title: CVE-2025-31340 · 9.9 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Wisdom Master Pro - Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program
item.description: A improper control of filename for include/require statement in PHP program vulnerability in the retrieve course Information function of Wisdom Master Pro versions 5.0 through 5.2 allows remote attackers to perform arbitrary system commands by runnin…

item.title: CVE-2024-12652 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Intumit SmartRobot′s Conversational AI Platform - Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
item.description: A Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in groovy script function in SmartRobot′s Conversational AI Platform before v7.2.0 allows remote authenticated users to perform arbitrary system commands via Groovy code.

item.title: CVE-2024-11984 · 9.4 CRITICAL — SUNNET Corporate Training Management System - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: A unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in epaper draft function in Corporate Training Management System before 10.13 allows remote authenticated users to bypass file upload restrictions and perform arbitrary system commands w…

item.title: CVE-2024-52959 · 9.3 CRITICAL — iota C.ai Conversational Platform - Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
item.description: A Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection') vulnerability in plugin management in iota C.ai Conversational Platform from 1.0.0 through 2.1.3 allows remote authenticated users to perform arbitrary system commands via a DLL file.

item.title: CVE-2024-52958 · 9.3 CRITICAL — iota C.ai Conversational Platform - Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature
item.description: A improper verification of cryptographic signature vulnerability in plugin management in iota C.ai Conversational Platform from 1.0.0 through 2.1.3 allows remote authenticated users to load a malicious DLL via upload plugin function.

item.title: CVE-2024-43776 · 8.7 HIGH — Huachu Easytest Online Learning Test Platform - SQL Injection
item.description: SQL Injection in mock exam function of Easytest Online Test Platform ver.24E01 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the qlevel parameter.

item.title: CVE-2024-43775 · 8.7 HIGH — Huachu Easytest Online Learning Test Platform - SQL Injection
item.description: SQL Injection in search course titles function of Easytest Online Test Platform ver.24E01 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the search parameter.

item.title: CVE-2024-43774 · 8.7 HIGH — Huachu Easytest Online Learning Test Platform - SQL Injection
item.description: SQL Injection in download personal learning course function of Easytest Online Test Platform ver.24E01 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the uid parameter.

item.title: CVE-2024-43773 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Huachu Easytest Online Learning Test Platform - SQL Injection
item.description: SQL Injection in download class learning course function of Easytest Online Test Platform ver.24E01 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the cstr parameter.

item.title: CVE-2024-43772 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Huachu Easytest Online Learning Test Platform - SQL Injection
item.description: SQL Injection in download student learning course function of Easytest Online Test Platform ver.24E01 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the uid parameter.

item.title: CVE-2024-7871 · 8.7 HIGH — Huachu Easytest Online Learning Test Platform - SQL Injection
item.description: SQL Injection in online dictionary function of Easytest Online Test Platform ver.24E01 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the word parameter.

item.title: CVE-2024-6118 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Hamastar MeetingHub Paperless Meetings - Plaintext Storage of a Password
item.description: A Plaintext Storage of a Password vulnerability in ebooknote function in Hamastar MeetingHub Paperless Meetings 2021 allows remote attackers to obtain the other users’ credentials and gain access to the product via an XML file.

item.title: CVE-2024-6117 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Hamastar MeetingHub Paperless Meetings - Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type
item.description: A Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in meeting management function in Hamastar MeetingHub Paperless Meetings 2021 allows remote authenticated users to perform arbitrary system commands via a crafted ASP file.

item.title: CVE-2024-5262 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — ProjectDiscovery Interactsh - Files or Directories Accessible to External Parties
item.description: Files or Directories Accessible to External Parties vulnerability in smb server in ProjectDiscovery Interactsh allows remote attackers to read/write any files in the directory and subdirectories of where the victim runs interactsh-server via anonymou…

item.title: CVE-2023-34210 · 7.7 HIGH — SQL Injection in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate
item.description: SQL Injection in create customer group function in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate 2023 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the ctl00$ContentPlaceHolder1$txtCustSQL parameter.

item.title: CVE-2023-34209 · 5 MEDIUM — Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate
item.description: Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere in create template function in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate 2023 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to obtain the absolute path via unencrypted VIEWSTATE parameter.

item.title: CVE-2023-34208 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Path Traversal in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate
item.description: Path Traversal in create template function in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate 2023 and earlier allow remote authenticated users to extract files into arbitrary directories via a crafted ZIP archive.

item.title: CVE-2023-34207 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate
item.description: Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in create template function in EasyUse MailHunter Ultimate 2023 and earlier allows remote authenticated users to perform arbitrary system commands with ‘NT Authority\SYSTEM‘ privilege via…

item.title: CVE-2023-25133 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Improper privilege management vulnerability in CyberPower PowerPanel Business
item.description: Improper privilege management vulnerability in default.cmd file in PowerPanel Business Local/Remote for Windows v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel Business Management for Windows v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel Business Local/Remote for Linux 32bit v4.8.6…

item.title: CVE-2023-25132 · 9.1 CRITICAL — Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in CyberPower PowerPanel Business
item.description: Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in default.cmd file in PowerPanel Business Local/Remote for Windows v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel Business Management for Windows v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel Business Local/Remote for…

item.title: CVE-2023-25131 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Use of default password vulnerability in CyberPower PowerPanel Business
item.description: Use of default password vulnerability in PowerPanel Business Local/Remote for Windows v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel Business Management for Windows v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel Business Local/Remote for Linux 32bit v4.8.6 and earlier, PowerPanel B…

item.title: CVE-2022-45796 · 9.1 CRITICAL — SHARP Multifunction Printer - Command Injection
item.description: Command injection vulnerability in nw_interface.html in SHARP multifunction printers (MFPs)'s Digital Full-color Multifunctional System 202 or earlier, 120 or earlier, 600 or earlier, 121 or earlier, 500 or earlier, 402 or earlier, 790 or earlier, an…
